prompt: Fix the env var parser that loses values containing equals signs

turns.content:
<task>
Fix the .env file parser — values containing '=' like DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@host/db are truncated at the first =.
</task>

arguments.reasoning: Line 16: strings.Split splits on ALL '=' signs, so DATABASE_URL=postgres://host/db=test splits into 3+ parts. Line 17 only processes lines with exactly 2 parts. Should use SplitN(line, '=', 2) to split on first '=' only.

arguments.summary: Fixed .env parser in goenv/parser.go:16 — changed strings.Split to strings.SplitN(line, '=', 2) so only the first '=' is used as delimiter. Values containing '=' are now preserved. Found file via glob. All 3 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Fixed .env parser to use SplitN with limit 2, preserving values containing '=' characters. All 3 tests pass.
